summary: FAIL overall. The chapter lands its required flip-turn, telemetry, and missing-time beats, and the dialogue stays distinct and character-true enough to pass. It still falls below pass level because a hard month contradiction breaks continuity and the prose overuses the same clipped fragment scaffold until it starts to feel mechanical rather than earned.
